name: Spinner
goal: Render an animated spinning indicator atom for inline loading affordance.
description: Pure CSS spinning ring used as an inline loading atom below ce-skeleton and ce-loading-state. Supports four sizes, three tones, and reduced-motion fallback (slow fade pulse). Carries role=status and aria-label for screen reader announcements.

props.name: size
props.description: Visual size of the spinner ring: xs=12px, sm=16px, md=20px, lg=28px.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the status region; maps to aria-label on the host.

props.name: tone
props.description: Color tone: default inherits currentColor from parent, muted uses --ce-muted, accent uses --ce-color-blue.

a11y.notes: The host element always carries role="status" and aria-label (driven by the label prop, default "Loading"). The inner decorative ring has aria-hidden="true". When the spinner is paired with adjacent visible text (e.g. "Saving…"), the label default is sufficient — the visible text provides the broader context for sighted users while the status role announces to screen readers.
